01-home-schedule.text: Your whole facility's day on one schedule — drag to book, click to edit.

02-home-needs-review.text: It flags what needs attention — no-shows, unlogged hours, cancellations.

03-rentals-schedule.text: Every cage and bullpen rental on a live booking calendar.

04-work-log.text: Every coach's logged hours, with unscheduled ones flagged.

05-attendance.text: Attendance by program or by player — with per-athlete session caps.

06-roster.text: Your full roster — athletes, programs, enrollments — in one place.

07-reports.text: What's owed for rentals vs. what each coach is paid — kept separate.

08-payments.text: Track every payment in and out — no spreadsheets.

09-records-audit.text: Manage coaches, import data, and a full audit log of every action.

10-coach-book.text: A coach grabs an open cage and books it in two taps.

11-coach-work-log.text: They log their own hours — or confirm scheduled work in one tap.

12-coach-attendance.text: Take attendance for a session in a few checkboxes.

13-coach-schedule.text: Their whole week — programs and rentals — in one view.

14-coach-owe.text: And exactly what they owe the facility, always current.
